g.text: Falco (runtime) — continuous alert stream via webhook
Import findings from all tools · deduplicate · assign to devs · track to closure
Has built-in parsers for Trivy, Checkov, Prowler, Kubescape, Gitleaks outputs
Falco alerts via Loki or Prometheus
Azure identity attack paths — separate tool
Defender for Cloud (you already pay for it — use it!)
Azure portal built-in dashboard · secure score · recommendations · alerts · free tier
Alert routing: Falco webhook → Azure Logic Apps → Teams/Email · or Alertmanager → PagerDuty
Runtime alerts need a separate real-time path — don't route through DefectDojo
